paper_title: Analysis of Spindle Microtubules in Diatom Fragilaria

methods.description: Reconstruction of microtubules (MTs) from transverse serial sections to analyze the distribution and length of spindle MTs in diatom Fragilaria.

steps.description: The MTs of the central spindle have been reconstructed from transverse serial sections.
steps.searchable_summary: reconstruct MTs from transverse serial sections

steps.description: The figures showing the end points of all the central spindle MTs are generated by plotting the serial number of each section along the horizontal axis and MT profiles along the vertical axis.
Estimate the length of individual MTs by counting the number of sections an MT traverses.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate MT length by section count

methods.method_name: Measurements of the Spindle from Longitudinal Sections
methods.description: Measurement of spindle length and morphological regions from longitudinal sections to analyze changes during mitosis.

steps.description: Each prophase spindle serially sectioned, and the length of the longest MTs extending between the poles, was measured.
steps.searchable_summary: measure spindle length from longitudinal sections

steps.description: Measure the length of three distinct morphological regions of the central spindle at metaphase.

methods.method_name: Analysis of the Spindle from Transverse Sections
methods.description: Reconstruction and analysis of central spindles from transverse sections to study MT distribution changes during mitosis.

steps.description: Reconstruct central spindles from serial sections.
steps.searchable_summary: reconstruct central spindles from serial sections

steps.description: Derive distribution profiles from the total number of MTs in each section along the spindle.
